answer: Metadata extraction success rate was affected because the concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index Markdown, so md_frontmatter_ingest_v1 used body_text_only instead of yaml_frontmatter. The remediation is to enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files, and the validation marker is concept-fm-canary-pass.

facts.remediation: enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files
facts.root_cause: concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown
